topic: 027 release-alignment deep review - Track A: are all README and code-README files across the public repo aligned with the current post-027 reality (stale MCP tool counts, removed/fictional search signals, dead paths, schema-version drift, agent-roster drift, daemon re-election / CLI front-door facts)? Read-only; P0/P1/P2 with file:line evidence; round-2 adversarial verify of every P0/P1.

scope.coverage: breadth across every repo area; depth = per-seat read-cap of <=12 highest-traffic READMEs (355 READMEs total cannot be exhaustively audited in one seat-pass)

executor.dispatch: orchestrator-driven read-only seats; pool=10 concurrent, spawns staggered 3s apart to dodge the simultaneous-launch race; orchestrator writes iteration/delta/state (Gate-3 safe); salvage-relaunch any empty seat once.

rounds.round2: adversarial verify every P0/P1 (fresh seat prompted to REFUTE)
